title: Document install and distribution paths
description: Make it clear how a user or agent should install and run Waystation locally. Cover Bun source execution, compiled binary usage, MCP stdio setup, and expected rebuild steps without adding a hosted service or remote dependency.
acceptance: README documents source-run and compiled-binary workflows using the local Bun path.
MCP usage notes explain how to launch the server over stdio from the local checkout.
The docs explain when to rebuild waystation.exe and what smoke checks to run.
Any package metadata changes are justified by the documented workflow.
bun test, typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate are clean.
notes: Keep this as documentation and packaging polish. Do not introduce an installer unless the task is explicitly expanded.
